<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\CssSelector\Node; /** * Represents a "<selector>.<name>" node. * * This component is a port of the Python cssselect library, * which is copyright Ian Bicking, @see https://github.com/SimonSapin/cssselect. * * @author Jean-François Simon <jeanfrancois.simon@sensiolabs.com> * * @internal */ class ClassNode extends AbstractNode { public function __construct( private NodeInterface $selector, private string $name, ) { } public function getSelector(): NodeInterface { return $this->selector; } public function getName(): string { return $this->name; } public function getSpecificity(): Specificity { return $this->selector->getSpecificity()->plus(new Specificity(0, 1, 0)); } public function __toString(): string { return \sprintf('%s[%s.%s]', $this->getNodeName(), $this->selector, $this->name); } }
